summary: 17 film announcements, 11 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Starman
film.announcement: Jeff Daniels cast opposite Brendan Fraser in Josh Wakely's sci-fi thriller.

film.title: Bad Day For Bigfoot
film.announcement: Chris Elliott and Michael Ian Black set to star in indie mystery film.

film.title: Scouts And Raiders
film.announcement: Skydance Sports developing film adaptation of 'Scouts and Raiders' book on Navy's first special warfare commandos with Perez and Filardi adapting.

film.title: The Grinch 2
film.announcement: Jim Carrey in talks to reteam with Ron Howard on 'The Grinch' sequel at Universal.

film.title: Little Santa
film.announcement: Peter Baynton to direct Apple Original Films' animated adaptation of 'Little Santa'.

film.title: Palm Grove
film.talent: Kate Hudson, Ana de Armas, Kornél Mundruczó (director), James Morosini (writer)
film.announcement: Kate Hudson and Ana de Armas to star in erotic thriller 'Palm Grove' from director Kornél Mundruczó, writer James Morosini and Chernin.

film.title: My What If Year
film.announcement: America Ferrera developing feature adaptation of Alisha Fernandez Miranda memoir 'My What If Year' at Warner Bros. with Heidi Schreck scripting.

film.title: Hellmask
film.announcement: Glenn Danzig to direct adaptation of his comic 'Hellmask'.

film.title: Untitled A Quiet Place Duo Sci-Fi
film.announcement: The directing duo behind 'A Quiet Place' to write and direct high-concept sci-fi movie for Amblin and Universal.

film.title: Hello & Paris
film.announcement: Kate Hudson and Javier Bardem rom-com 'Hello & Paris' adds six cast members at Amazon MGM.

film.title: I Am AI
film.announcement: Hugo Award finalist 'I Am AI' novelette optioned for feature film adaptation.

film.title: America 250 Comedy Shorts Series
film.announcement: Chris Pratt to star in America 250 comedy shorts series with historian Doris Kearns Goodwin.

film.title: Wicker
film.announcement: Sundance hit 'Wicker' with Olivia Colman and Alexander Skarsgård sets theatrical release date.

film.title: Survivor Animated Movie
film.announcement: Jeff Probst confirms 'Survivor' animated movie in the works at Paramount.

film.title: Untitled Secret Daniels Event Pic
film.announcement: Charles Melton joins Matt Damon in secret Daniels event picture at Universal.

film.title: Street Smart
film.announcement: Catherine Hardwicke directs 'Street Smart' about homeless Venice youth with Sally Struthers cast.

tv.title: Bet
tv.announcement: Saweetie joins season 2 of Netflix teen drama 'Bet'.

tv.title: Fallout
tv.talent: Manny Jacinto, Emily Mortimer, Thomasin McKenzie
tv.announcement: Manny Jacinto, Emily Mortimer and Thomasin McKenzie join season 3 of Amazon series 'Fallout'.

tv.title: The God Of The Woods
tv.announcement: Tracy Letts and Lola Kirke among 14 cast members rounding out Netflix's 'The God Of The Woods'.

tv.title: 13 Going On 30
tv.announcement: Adeline Rudolph joins Netflix's '13 Going On 30' reboot.

tv.title: Dancing With The Stars
tv.announcement: Guillermo Rodriguez, Jimmy Kimmel's right hand man, joins season 35 celebrity cast.

tv.title: Simon Says
tv.announcement: Netflix turning 'Simon Says' game into a competition show.

tv.title: Ryan Coogler TV Deal
tv.announcement: Ryan Coogler moves his Proximity Media TV deal from Disney to Netflix.

tv.title: Wonder Presents: The Stand-Ups
tv.announcement: Wonder Project gets into stand-up with six-special series 'Wonder Presents: The Stand-Ups'.

tv.title: Project Runway
tv.talent: Tyra Banks (recurring judge), Hannah Berner, Paige DeSorbo, Niecy Nash-Betts (guest stars)
tv.announcement: Season 22 features Tyra Banks as recurring judge with multiple guest star judges.

tv.title: The Diplomat
tv.announcement: Keri Russell teases 'The Diplomat' season 4 as Emmy buzz builds.

tv.title: Only Murders In The Building
tv.announcement: Details revealed about season 5 mystery hook.
